title: Musikladen
overview: Der Musikladen was a West German music television programme that ran from December 13, 1972 to November 29, 1984. The show continued the 1960s Beat-Club under a new name, and in turn was replaced by Extratour.

episodes.title: Musikladen - Beat Club Studio - Emmylou Harris & The Hot Band - March 26, 1977
